games:
Games are one of the best ways to engage visitors, spark their curiosity, and leave them with an experience they won’t forget. Our agency has been creating game-based activations for brands and events for many years. We know that catching people’s attention is no easy task – each year it gets harder to come up with a concept that is original, fun, and hasn’t been used in some form before.

And that’s exactly the challenge we love.

We’re constantly looking for ways to connect a brand’s world with interactive entertainment – from simple mini-games that liven up a festival zone to sophisticated mechanics with a digital layer that strengthen customer engagement. Every project starts with the same question: What do we want visitors to experience? What do we want them to take away?

In the past three years alone, we have created, rebranded, or redesigned over 90 game activations of various sizes – from small skill-based contests to complex experiential installations. They all had one thing in common: they captured attention, engaged audiences, and turned an ordinary visit into a memorable moment.
kreativa:
Long-overlooked creativity is finally taking center stage, and its importance is growing by the day. We are fully aware of this fact, which is why we leave nothing to chance when creating our activities. Routine and predictability are not in our vocabulary. Every project is an opportunity to push boundaries, to craft experiences that feel fresh, bold, and alive.

We thrive on thinking outside the box. Some of our ideas may initially surprise or even confuse but we believe that true innovation often begins with a spark that challenges expectations. We’re not afraid to experiment, to take a step into the unknown, and to explore concepts that others might overlook.

There are never enough ideas and we always have plenty of them up our sleeves. Who knows, maybe it will see the light of day soon.
spotrebitelska-soutez:
Consumer contests are an essential business tool for big brands, creating excitement, engagement, and loyalty among customers.

Organizing such complex activations is always a challenge—and that’s exactly what drives us. Our role is to provide a full-service solution, ensuring that every part of the contest runs flawlessly from start to finish. This includes strategic planning, creative concept development, and complete operational execution.

We handle it all. From setting up temporary call centers to manage inquiries and validate entries, to coordinating couriers for timely prize deliveries. We negotiate with suppliers, order and brand prizes, and prepare all the necessary printed materials—ensuring the contest carries a cohesive visual identity at every touchpoint and, last but not least, deliver everything to the winners' homes.

As part of one of our contests, we have gifted more than 12,000 winners.
konference:
A conference doesn't just mean a white name tag with a lanyard and a branded pad with a pen to go with it. Gone are the days when a conference was synonymous with a hall full of half-asleep company employees who simply had to accept the invitees.

We can do them in other ways too. And you will definitely not be bored.

Changing from a boring monologue to a presentation in a former slaughterhouse or in a virtual world in space is the way to go. And we enjoy it! Every year, we prepare conferences in cooperation with our partners in all corners of the country.
skladove-prostory:
We store material for most of our clients. Year-round or during the season. Our warehouse spaces can be used outside of Prague also in Brno, Ostrava, Pilsen, Olomouc or České Budějovice, Nitra and Bratislava.

For our clients, we designed a unique online warehouse system that simplifies the system of short-term and long-term loans.

It helps not only us, but also our clients in orientation in stocks and materials 24/7.
hostess:
Given the diversity of our events, our hostesses are not only beautiful but also smart.

We pride ourselves on building long-term relationships – not only with our clients but also within our own teams. This is why you will often meet the same familiar faces at our events. Our hostesses and coordinators grow with us, gaining experience with every activation, which allows them to deliver a flawless and authentic brand experience time and time again.

We are also proud of our strong local presence. We have teams of coordinators and hostesses ready to support events in every major city across the Czech Republic and Slovakia.
provoz-e-shopu:
Many website concepts have already passed through our hands. Whether it was the development and production of an e-shop, or purely its operation. We created sales platforms for Jägermeister, Metaxa, Staropramen and Tullamore.

We currently take care of, for example, online platforms for the sale of Tap Machine, alternative pages of student ambassadors or an online game.
promo-materialy:
Sometimes our projects start with a simple spark. One day, an excited client rushed to us with a clear vision and said: “I need this!”

From that moment, the clock started ticking. In just one month, we turned an idea into reality. What began as a concept for a round bar quickly evolved into a complete, fully equipped event space. Alongside the bar, we designed and produced everything else needed to bring the client’s vision to life—tents, fences, four stylish pergolas, solid wooden tables, and ambient lighting that set the perfect mood.

No detail was overlooked. We even crafted branded paper cups to complete the experience and ensure every touchpoint reflected the client’s identity. From the first 3D visualizations and graphic designs to the printing of promotional brochures, we managed the entire process from start to finish.

The result? A fully immersive event space that perfectly captured the atmosphere our client wanted to create.
prestavby-aut:
We've been reinventing things since time immemorial. Although mobile projects are closer to us, our portfolio also includes buildings of enormous dimensions that reap success at all events where they get to. Whether it is construction from containers, scaffolding or wood.

In addition to multifunctional vehicles, we take care of our own vehicle fleet. We have a herd of vans of various sizes, we provide transport using luxury Caravells and we can even build a personal tent city led by a caravan and an American Airstream.
event-marketing:
Its unequivocal definition does not exist, and perhaps that is why it is the biggest challenge for us. Combine experience, planning, organization and, in fact, the entire execution. Our goal is to deepen the relationship between business partners, the brand and consumers in the form of an extraordinary experience. Whether the event contains promotional elements or not.

All events that have passed under our hands can be proud of their originality and strong creativity. We can tune in to the brand's wave of emotions and create a tailored activity together with the client. There are no limits to imagination.
